item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes the requested N+1 reminder, explicitly refuses the local patch, identifies the repeated overlay pattern across prior failures, shifts ownership upstream to the submission acceptance mechanism, and proposes structural redesign/consolidation instead of adding another reminder.
